title: Unified Garden
definition: The realization that the self, others, and the world are interconnected and form a single, living entity, akin to a garden.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The realization that the self, others, and the world are interconnected and form a single, living entity, akin to a garden.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The realization that the self, others, and the world are interconnected and form a single, living entity, akin to a garden.
difficulty_levels.expert: A profound understanding of interdependence and unity in existence, fostering compassion and awareness towards self and others.

extra_fields.insight: A profound understanding of interdependence and unity in existence, fostering compassion and awareness towards self and others.
